title: Uploading new data to replace old data
excerpt: I would like to replace a list of accounts with a new list but I don’t want to lose the connections I’ve made across the boards. Will Monday recognise that the names have been replaced and preserve the connections alread…

posts.author: jennifer.short (Jennifer Short)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to replace a list of accounts with a new list but I don’t want to lose the connections I’ve made across the boards. Will Monday recognise that the names have been replaced and preserve the connections already built?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jennifer!

If I am understanding correctly, you’re looking to remove the boards connected in your connect boards columns and then add new boards to the same columns?

It might be helpful to have our support team walk you through what you have currently set up and how to make the changes you want while preserving your workflow. You can reach out to us here!

posts.author: jennifer.short (Jennifer Short)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte,

Yes that is exactly it. I need to replace a whole set of data, namely our clients with a new set of data which will be closely aligned to Xero ready for integration. I will be grateful for any help available!
